THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERANEK, LARRY F. $5,021.32 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,242.55 INTEREST, $334.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,397.87, SEE SCANNED DOC
